description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front features a driveway with a carport, manicured landscaping, and tall, narrow shrubs flanking the entryway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious patio with outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and a privacy wall, surrounded by green lawn and trees. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor living spaces. The exterior is finished in white and beige tones, with stone accents and minimalist detailing. The overall layout emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a backyard featuring a pool and patio. The design is clean and geometric with white and beige finishes and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entryway, and manicured landscaping with tall shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long patio, outdoor seating, and the pool area extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, privacy wall, and large sliding glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, additional patio space, and the overall length of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, minimalist door, flanked by tall shrubs and accessed via a paved path
